141 _39ODD EXPRSN_VCL_NVCL_DSCHRG_CD (39Odd) Communication - Vocal/Nonvocal/Both: Discharge CHAR 1 A score indicating the patient's ability for expression at discharge. Expression includes clear vocal or non-vocal expression of language. This item includes either intelligible speech or clear expression of language using writing or a communication device.
